role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on the etymology of 'INHOFF' and script type (Latin).

role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific tree species (Copper Beech, Lime) and their regional prevalence.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure, specifically the interlocking paver shoulders and fencing.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (brickwork, fencing, roof tiles) to distinguish between Northern European neighbors.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed a high-quality analysis. The agents correctly identified the visual markers of Northern/Central Europe (flat terrain, specific paving, brick architecture) and successfully narrowed the candidates to Germany, Denmark, and the Netherlands. The final decision was well-supported by the consensus of the specialists.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the 'INHOFF' sign and Latin script.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the flat terrain, deciduous trees, and brick house.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the Copper Beech and Lime trees visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the interlocking paver shoulders and wire mesh fencing.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately synthesized the visual style of the rural residential area.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The final prediction was Germany, which matches the ground truth.
